title: Ralph loop agent harness
text: Agent loop with verify step improved PR velocity 2x in an internal benchmark. Setup: 1. Clone the repo 2. Configure verify criteria 3. Run the loop on a feature branch 4. Measure review cycles

title: MCP servers for IDE workflows
text: MCP server setup guide for Cursor and Claude. Developers report 30% faster context switching. Steps: install the server, add it to IDE config, restart the agent session

title: Eval harness for LLM regressions
text: Eval harness caught 40% more regressions before deploy. Steps: define eval cases, run the suite in CI, block rollout on failed regressions

title: Cursor agent workflow docs
text: Agent workflow documentation with loop patterns and review automation. Measured latency stayed under 200ms for common tasks. Steps: enable agent mode, add repo rules, run the review loop

title: Claude Code CLI setup
text: CLI workflow for terminal agent development. Setup README with install and project init. Steps: install the CLI, authenticate the account, run project init in the repo

title: LangGraph production deploy patterns
text: Production deploy with observability and rollback staging patterns shipped by multiple teams. Steps: add tracing, stage the rollout, wire rollback checkpoints

title: Provider routing cost latency benchmark
text: Provider routing for coding models showed 3x cost reduction while holding latency under 400ms. Steps: label prompt classes, route cheap prompts to a smaller model, send code diffs to a higher quality model

title: Ralph loop agent harness discussion
text: Ralph loop agent harness users echoed the same agent loop review gains from the primary repo

title: Eval harness catches LLM regressions
text: An eval harness for LLM regressions caught failures before release and reinforced the same regression workflow as the primary repo
